channel.title: web on Re-toor
channel.description: Recent content in web on Re-toor

item.title: Tryhackme - Ignite
item.description: Hello, this is Neo. Today we have a CTF Tryhackme - Ignite. Let’s go!!! Firstly, always, I will scan open port. I use Rustscan because it faster than nmap, moreover it can integrates with nmap. It just have a open port 80 which running Apache httpd version 2.4.18 on Ubuntu server. With header Fuel CMS, That’s mean it was built on fuel cms version 1.4. In the robots.txt I have a entry /fuel.

item.title: Tryhackme - Startup
item.description: ) Hello, this is Neo. Today we have a CTF Tryhackme - Startup. Let’s go!!! Firstly, always, I will scan open port. I use rustscan because it faster than nmap, moreover it can integrates with nmap. I have 3 open port: port 21 with ftp server and I can login by anonymous. port 22 are running ssh on ubuntu server port 80 with Apache httpd 2.4.18 on ubuntu server In port 21, I have some insteresting here.

item.title: Tryhackme - Wgel CTF
item.description: Hello, this is Neo. Today we have a CTF Tryhackme - Wgel CTF. Let’s go!!! Reconnaissance Firstly, always, I will scan open port. I use rustscan because it faster than nmap, moreover it can integrates with nmap. PORT STATE SERVICE REASON VERSION 22/tcp open ssh syn-ack OpenSSH 7.2p2 Ubuntu 4ubuntu2.8 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0) | ssh-hostkey: | 2048 94:96:1b:66:80:1b:76:48:68:2d:14:b5:9a:01:aa:aa (RSA) | ssh-rsa  | 256 18:f7:10:cc:5f:40:f6:cf:92:f8:69:16:e2:48:f4:38 (ECDSA) | ecdsa-sha2-nistp256 AAAAE2VjZHNhLXNoYTItbmlzdHAyNTYAAAAIbmlzdHAyNTYAAABBBDCxodQaK+2npyk3RZ1Z6S88i6lZp2kVWS6/f955mcgkYRrV1IMAVQ+jRd5sOKvoK8rflUPajKc9vY5Yhk2mPj8= | 256 b9:0b:97:2e:45:9b:f3:2a:4b:11:c7:83:10:33:e0:ce (ED25519) |_ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIJhXt+ZEjzJRbb2rVnXOzdp5kDKb11LfddnkcyURkYke 80/tcp open http syn-ack Apache httpd 2.

item.title: Tryhackme - LazyAdmin
item.description: Hello, this is Neo. Today we have a CTF Tryhackme - LazyAdmin. Let’s go!!! Firstly, always, I will scan open port. I use Rustscan because it faster than nmap, moreover it can integrates with nmap. There’re 2 open port: port 22 with ssh service on Ubuntu server port 80 with Apache httpd 2.4.18 on Ubuntu server Just a Apache2 Default page. Check around the source code but nothing special.

item.title: Tryhackme - Bounty Hacker
item.description: Hello, this is Neo. Today we have a CTF Tryhackme - Bounty Hacker. Let’s get root!!! Firstly, always, I will scan open port. I use rustscan because it faster than nmap, moreover it can integrates with nmap. There’re 3 openning port: Port 21 is running ftp-vsftpd 3.0.3 and allow to login with anonymous Port 22 is running ssh service on Ubuntu server Port 80 is running web service with Apache 2.

item.title: Tryhackme - Simple CTF
item.description: Hello, this is Neo. Today we have a CTF Tryhackme - Simple CTF. Let’s get root!!! Firstly, always, I will scan open port. I use rustscan because it faster than nmap, moreover it can integrates with nmap. There’re 3 openning port: Port 21 with ftp-vsftpd 3.0.3 Port 80 with web service Apache 2.4.18 on Ubuntu server Port 2222 with ssh service In port 21, we can login with Anonymous.

item.title: Tryhackme - Pickle Rick
